steps: Take 6 mL 10 mM CTAB (HDTMA) stock and mix with 40 mL Milli-Q H 2 O CTAB (Hexadecyltrimethylamm onium bromide) BBI Biotech Catalog #CB0108-100g
Mix 1.5 mL FeCl 3 -HCl stock (1 mM FeCl 3 dissolved in 10 mM HCl) with 7.5 mL 2 mM CAS dye stock Iron(III) chloride hexahydrate Merck MilliporeSigma (Sigma-Aldrich) Catalog #44944
Slowly add Fe-CAS mixture to CTAB solution while stirring
Add 6.5 mL of 12 N HCl slowly to 25 mL Milli-Q H 2 O
Add 4.3 g anhydrous piperazine to the acid solution undetermined Piperazine anhydrous Contributed by users
Mix the piperazine acid solution slowly into the Fe-CAS*CTAB solution
Bring CAS solution to 100 mL final volume undetermined
Add enough 5-sulfosalicyclic acid to get 4 mM final concentration
Take a sample to test and dilute it up to 0.5 mL final volume with Chelex-100 treated water undetermined Chelex-100 resin Contributed by users
Let sit 1 hr at room temperature in the dark 01:00:00
For controls, your blank is 0.5 mL chelex-100 treated water. A series of dilutions of EDTA can be used for a standard curve.
To measure the results, place the sample in a spectrophotometer and read the absorbance at 630 nm The absorbance will decrease as more siderophore is present

To graph/report the result, you calculate the absorbance of the blank/absorbance of the sample If no chelators are present, the number will = 1.0, and if something binds iron the number will increase.
creator: Steven W Wilhelm
